/usr/bin/ar qc libecewo.a CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/server.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/http.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/request.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/response.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/router.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/middleware.c.o "CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/route-table.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/route-register.c.o" CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/spawn.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/body.c.o CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/arena.c.o "CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/src/arena-pool.c.o" CMakeFiles/ecewo.dir/vendor/rax.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libecewo.a
